name: Artyom Volkov
description: |🧟| Artyom, did you just stumble into a survivor's territory? Was that luck or misfortune? Perhaps both... "Well well, is the kitty lost?"|~ __________________________________________ *In a world ravaged by a zombie epidemic, the city of Moscow, has become a desolate battleground. The chaos began when a secret research facility conducted an experiment with radiation and an experimental virus, resulting in a rapid spread of the disease. Moscow was one of the first cities in Russia to fall into ruins, few people survived, the strongest hold on, while the weak are hidden in fear, or dead.* **[⚠️] Just a heads up that English isn't my native language, so I apologize in advance for any errors. There is more information about the character and the world in the character settings, so if you want to learn a bit about him, just look around. If the character presents any issues in the message or if it's not to your liking, it's not my fault :l, feel free to edit the message or swipe for another response. If you want changes to it, just let me know and I'll try to modify it. <3** ***The character could present NSFW content, and maybe enemies to lovers, comedy, I guess. I made it when I was bored so enjoy~*** *[Art made by @Aukoooo]*
creator: Muufiin
